samoan_text: Auā e leai se faamaoni i o latou gutu; o latou loto foi, ua matuā leaga; ua se tuugamau ua faamaga o latou faaī; ua faaoleole i latou i o latou laulaufaiva.
samoan_glosses: Auā=for; e leai se faamaoni=there is no faithful; i o latou=in of they; gutu;=mouth; o latou loto foi,=they heart also; ua matuā leaga;=exceedingly evil; ua=ua; se tuugamau=a grave
kjv_text: For there is no faithfulness in their mouth; their inward part is very wickedness; their throat is an open sepulchre; they flatter with their tongue.
issue: Theological term צֶדֶק (tsedeq) = righteousness, justice not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: o la'u faipule o Iuta lea; o Moapi o le ipu lea ou te mulumulu ai; ou te lafoina lo'u seevae i Etoma; Filisitia e, ina alaga ia i lou manumalo ia te au.
samoan_glosses: o la'u faipule=my a councillor; o Iuta lea;=Judas; o Moapi=Moab; o le ipu lea=the cup; ou te mulumulu ai;=I will to rub; ou te lafoina=I will cast; lo'u seevae=my a shoe; i Etoma;=in Edom
kjv_text: Moab is my washpot; over Edom will I cast out my shoe: Philistia, triumph thou because of me.
issue: Theological term קָדוֹשׁ (qadosh) = holy, set apart, sacred not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: Ona ou fai pesega ai lea i lou suafa e faavavau, ina ia ou avatua i lea aso ma lea aso o mea na ou tauto ai.
samoan_glosses: Ona ou fai pesega ai lea=and I make singing accompanied by then then; i lou suafa=in your name; e faavavau,=forever/everlasting; ina ia ou avatua=so that I given away; i lea=in; aso=day; ma lea=and; aso o mea=day of thing
kjv_text: So will I sing praise unto thy name for ever, that I may daily perform my vows.
issue: Theological term חֶסֶד (chesed) = covenant loyalty, mercy not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: Na fetalai faatasi mai le Atua; ua ou faalogo faalua i lenei mea, o i le Atua le malosi.
samoan_glosses: Na fetalai faatasi mai le Atua;=said together from God; ua ou faalogo=I hearken; faalua=twice; i lenei=in this; mea,=thing; o=o; i le Atua=in the God; le malosi.=the strong
kjv_text: God hath spoken once; twice have I heard this; that power belongeth unto God.
issue: Theological term בָּטַח (batach) = trust, be confident, feel secure not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: Tou te feosofi ea i le tagata seia afea? E fasiotia outou uma lava; e pei o le pa ua tulolo o le āi ua tuleia.
samoan_glosses: Tou te feosofi ea=second person plural feosofi indeed?/really?; i le tagata seia afea?=in the man how long?/until when?; E fasiotia outou uma lava;=to slain all of you; e pei o le pa=like the a wall; ua tulolo=to bend down (as a tree^; o le āi=the āi; ua tuleia.=tuleia
kjv_text: How long will ye imagine mischief against a man? ye shall be slain all of you: as a bowing wall shall ye be, and as a tottering fence.
issue: Theological term יְשׁוּעָה (yeshuah) = salvation, deliverance not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: Le nuu e, ia outou faatuatua ia te ia i aso uma; ia outou momoli atu o outou loto i ona luma; o lo tatou malu o le Atua lea. Selā.
samoan_glosses: Le nuu e,=the nation by; ia outou faatuatua ia te ia=to you (all) faith to him; i aso uma;=all the days; ia outou momoli atu=to you (all) to carry; o outou loto=you (all) heart; i ona luma;=before him; o lo tatou malu=our female tattoo; o le Atua lea.=of God
kjv_text: Trust in him at all times; ye people, pour out your heart before him: God is a refuge for us. Selah.
issue: Theological term יְשׁוּעָה (yeshuah) = salvation, deliverance not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: Le nuu e, ia outou faatuatua ia te ia i aso uma; ia outou momoli atu o outou loto i ona luma; o lo tatou malu o le Atua lea. Selā.
samoan_glosses: Le nuu e,=the nation by; ia outou faatuatua ia te ia=to you (all) faith to him; i aso uma;=all the days; ia outou momoli atu=to you (all) to carry; o outou loto=you (all) heart; i ona luma;=before him; o lo tatou malu=our female tattoo; o le Atua lea.=of God
kjv_text: Trust in him at all times; ye people, pour out your heart before him: God is a refuge for us. Selah.
issue: Theological term כָּבוֹד (kavod) = glory, weight, honor not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: E moni, e faatauvaa lava tagata lautele, e pepelo foi alii; e siitia i latou i le fua faatautau, o i latou faatasi e sili ona mamasagia i le mea faatauvaa.
samoan_glosses: E moni,=verily/truly; e faatauvaa lava tagata lautele,=to vain indeed man wide; e pepelo foi=to false also; alii;=Lord; e siitia=to lifted up; i latou=them; i le fua faatautau,=in the fruit make to hang up; o=o
kjv_text: Surely men of low degree are vanity, and men of high degree are a lie: to be laid in the balance, they are altogether lighter than vanity.
issue: Theological term בָּטַח (batach) = trust, be confident, feel secure not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: Auā o lou alofa e sili ona lelei lea i le ola; ou te vivii atu lava ia te oe i o'u laugutu.
samoan_glosses: Auā=for; o lou alofa=your love; e sili=to most; ona lelei lea=and good; i le ola;=in the life; ou te vivii atu=I will praised; lava ia te oe=indeed unto you; i o'u laugutu.=in my lips
kjv_text: Because thy lovingkindness is better than life, my lips shall praise thee.
issue: Theological term כָּבוֹד (kavod) = glory, weight, honor not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: O lea ou te faamanū atu ai ia te oe a o ou ola; ou te sii o'u lima i lou suafa.
samoan_glosses: O lea=therefore; ou te faamanū atu ai=I will faamanū; ia te oe=unto you; a o ou ola;=but of I life; ou te sii o'u lima=I will lift up my five; i lou suafa.=in your name
kjv_text: Thus will I bless thee while I live: I will lift up my hands in thy name.
issue: Theological term חֶסֶד (chesed) = covenant loyalty, steadfast love not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: Ia e natia a'u ai le taupulepulega a e amio leaga, ma le faanunununu o e fai amioletonu.
samoan_glosses: Ia e natia a'u=to to hide me; ai=ai; le taupulepulega=the taupulepulega; a=but; e amio leaga,=to iniquity; ma le faanunununu=and the faanunununu; o=o; e fai amioletonu.=to make wickedness
kjv_text: Hide me from the secret counsel of the wicked; from the insurrection of the workers of iniquity:
issue: Theological term יָרֵא (yare) = fear, reverence, awe not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: Ua latou faamataina o latou laulaufaiva e pei o se pelu; ua latou lolou i aufana e fana mai a latou u, o upu ogo lava ia;
samoan_glosses: Ua latou faamataina=they made eye; o latou laulaufaiva=they tongue; e pei o se pelu;=like a sword; ua latou lolou=they lolou; i aufana=in bow; e fana mai=to gun from; a latou u,=but they u; o upu ogo=word to scorch
kjv_text: Who whet their tongue like a sword, and bend their bows to shoot their arrows, even bitter words:
issue: Theological term עָוֹן (avon) = iniquity, guilt, punishment not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: Ua latou fefaamalosiai i le mea leaga; ua latou filifili e natia ni matāsele; ua latou faapea ane, O ai se na te iloa i latou?
samoan_glosses: Ua latou fefaamalosiai=they strengthened one another; i le mea leaga;=in the thing evil; ua latou filifili=they chose; e natia ni matāsele;=to hide some matāsele; ua latou faapea ane,=they thus; O ai=O ai; se=a; na te iloa=he knew
kjv_text: They encourage themselves in an evil matter: they commune of laying snares privily; they say, Who shall see them?
issue: Theological term יָרֵא (yare) = fear, reverence, awe not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: Le Atua o lo matou olataga e, e te tali mai ia te i matou ma le tonu i mea matautia; o oe le faatuatuaga o tulu'iga uma lava o le lalolagi, atoa ma e o mamao i le vasa.
samoan_glosses: Le Atua=God; o lo matou olataga e,=our (excl) salvation by; e te tali=by respond; mai ia te=from; i matou=in we (excl); ma le tonu=and the right; i mea matautia;=in thing fearful; o oe=you
kjv_text: By terrible things in righteousness wilt thou answer us, O God of our salvation; who art the confidence of all the ends of the earth, and of them that are afar off upon the sea:
issue: Theological term קָדוֹשׁ (qadosh) = holy, set apart, sacred not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: Le Atua o lo matou olataga e, e te tali mai ia te i matou ma le tonu i mea matautia; o oe le faatuatuaga o tulu'iga uma lava o le lalolagi, atoa ma e o mamao i le vasa.
samoan_glosses: Le Atua=God; o lo matou olataga e,=our (excl) salvation by; e te tali=by respond; mai ia te=from; i matou=in we (excl); ma le tonu=and the right; i mea matautia;=in thing fearful; o oe=you

issue: Theological term הֵיכָל (heykal) = temple, palace not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: O loo faatumauina mauga i lona lava malosi; o loo fusia o ia i le mana;
samoan_glosses: O loo faatumauina mauga=is (progressive) established mountain; i lona lava malosi;=in his indeed strong; o loo fusia=is (progressive) fusia; o ia=he; i le mana;=in the to get
kjv_text: Which by his strength setteth fast the mountains; being girded with power:
issue: Theological term צֶדֶק (tsedeq) = righteousness, justice not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: O loo faatumauina mauga i lona lava malosi; o loo fusia o ia i le mana;
samoan_glosses: O loo faatumauina mauga=is (progressive) established mountain; i lona lava malosi;=in his indeed strong; o loo fusia=is (progressive) fusia; o ia=he; i le mana;=in the to get

issue: Theological term יְשׁוּעָה (yeshuah) = salvation, deliverance not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: O loo faatumauina mauga i lona lava malosi; o loo fusia o ia i le mana;
samoan_glosses: O loo faatumauina mauga=is (progressive) established mountain; i lona lava malosi;=in his indeed strong; o loo fusia=is (progressive) fusia; o ia=he; i le mana;=in the to get

issue: Theological term בָּטַח (batach) = trust, be confident, feel secure not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: Le Atua e, ia viia oe e le nuu; ia viia lava oe e le nuu, o i latou uma lava.
samoan_glosses: Le Atua e,=God by; ia viia oe=to praised you; e le nuu;=shall not nation; ia viia lava oe=to praised indeed you; e le nuu,=shall not nation; o=o; i latou uma lava.=them all indeed
kjv_text: Let the people praise thee, O God; let all the people praise thee.
issue: Theological term יְשׁוּעָה (yeshuah) = salvation, deliverance not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: Ua muamua o e pepese, ua mulimuli o e ta laaupese; ua i le va taupou ta topa.
samoan_glosses: Ua muamua o=first the beginning of; e pepese,=to sing; ua mulimuli o=followed after of; e ta laaupese;=to a stroke laaupese; ua=ua; i le va taupou ta topa.=in the expanse virgin a stroke topa
kjv_text: The singers went before, the players on instruments followed after; among them were the damsels playing with timbrels.
issue: Theological term קָדוֹשׁ (qadosh) = holy, set apart, sacred not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: Ia e aoai i manu feai o i mea ūa, atoa ma le vao povi malolosi ma tamai povi a le nuu, seia ifo mai ia ma fāsi ario; ia e faataapeapeina le nuu ua naunau i taua.
samoan_glosses: Ia e aoai i=to to chastise in; manu feai o=animal wild of; i mea ūa,=in thing ūa; atoa ma le vao povi malolosi=and the vegetation cattle mighty; ma tamai povi=and son cattle; a le nuu,=but the nation; seia ifo mai ia=until down from to; ma fāsi ario;=and fāsi silver
kjv_text: Rebuke the company of spearmen, the multitude of the bulls, with the calves of the people, till every one submit himself with pieces of silver: scatter thou the people that delight in war.
issue: Theological term הֵיכָל (heykal) = temple, palace not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: Ia outou pepese atu i le Atua, ia fai pesega i lona suafa; ia outou faalaulelei le ala mo lē tietie ma afio atu i le vao; o Ioa o lona suafa lea, ma ia outou olioli i ona luma.
samoan_glosses: Ia outou pepese atu i le Atua,=to you (all) sing in the God; ia fai pesega i lona=to make singing accompanied by in his; suafa;=name; ia outou faalaulelei=to you (all) make even; le ala=the way; mo lē tietie=for not ride; ma afio atu=and dwell (respectful); i le vao;=in the wilderness
kjv_text: Sing unto God, sing praises to his name: extol him that rideth upon the heavens by his name JAH, and rejoice before him.
issue: Theological term צַדִּיק (tsaddiq) = righteous one not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: O le Atua na te faatagatāina e ua ausage; na te aumaia e ua noanoatia i le mea e manuia ai; a o e fouvale, latou te nonofo i le nuu naumati.
samoan_glosses: O le Atua=of God; na te faatagatāina=he faatagatāina; e ua ausage;=by ausage; na te aumaia=he brought here; e ua noanoatia=by noanoatia; i le mea=in the thing; e manuia ai;=to peace; a o=but of
kjv_text: God setteth the solitary in families: he bringeth out those which are bound with chains: but the rebellious dwell in a dry land.
issue: Theological term קָדוֹשׁ (qadosh) = holy, set apart, sacred not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: Ia e laveai mai ia te au ai le palapala, aua ne'i ou goto ai; ia laveaiina a'u i e ua 'ino'ino mai ia te au, atoa ma vai loloto.
samoan_glosses: Ia e laveai=to to deliver; mai ia te au=from me; ai=ai; le palapala,=the blood; aua ne'i ou goto ai;=for now I goto; ia laveaiina a'u=to delivered me; i=in; e ua 'ino'ino=by hated
kjv_text: Deliver me out of the mire, and let me not sink: let me be delivered from them that hate me, and out of the deep waters.
issue: Theological term חֶסֶד (chesed) = covenant loyalty, steadfast love not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: Ia e laveai mai ia te au ai le palapala, aua ne'i ou goto ai; ia laveaiina a'u i e ua 'ino'ino mai ia te au, atoa ma vai loloto.
samoan_glosses: Ia e laveai=to to deliver; mai ia te au=from me; ai=ai; le palapala,=the blood; aua ne'i ou goto ai;=for now I goto; ia laveaiina a'u=to delivered me; i=in; e ua 'ino'ino=by hated
kjv_text: Deliver me out of the mire, and let me not sink: let me be delivered from them that hate me, and out of the deep waters.
issue: Theological term אֱמֶת (emet) = truth, faithfulness, reliability not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: Aua ne'i 'alo ou fofoga i lau auauna; auā ua ou puapuagaina; ia vave ona e tali mai ia te au.
samoan_glosses: Aua ne'i 'alo ou fofoga=for now Son I face; i lau auauna;=in your servant; auā=for; ua ou puapuagaina;=I affliction; ia vave=to quick; ona=and; e tali mai ia te au.=to respond from me
kjv_text: And hide not thy face from thy servant; for I am in trouble: hear me speedily.
issue: Theological term חֶסֶד (chesed) = covenant loyalty, steadfast love not found in Samoan glosses

samoan_text: O oe, ua e silafia le faalumaina o a'u, ma le faamaina o a'u, ma lo'u faamasiasiga; ua i ou luma o i latou uma o e ita mai ia te au.
samoan_glosses: O oe,=you; ua e silafia=you knew; le faalumaina=the to stigmatize; o a'u,=I am; ma le faamaina=and the to put to shame; o a'u,=I am; ma lo'u faamasiasiga;=and my faamasiasiga; ua=ua

samoan_glosses: Ou te faaoo atu foi=I will bring upon also; lona lima=his five; i le sami=in the sea; ma lona lima taumatau=and his five right hand; i vaitafe.=in river

samoan_text: O a'u foi, ou te faia o ia ma ulumatua, e silisili o ia i tupu o le lalolagi.
samoan_glosses: O a'u foi,=I am also; ou te faia=I will make; o ia=he; ma ulumatua,=and the first-born; e silisili o ia=to very much he; i tupu=in king; o le lalolagi.=the earth

samoan_text: Ou te tofia lana fanau ia faavavau, o lona nofoālii foi e pei o aso o le lagi.

samoan_text: Ou te tofia lana fanau ia faavavau, o lona nofoālii foi e pei o aso o le lagi.

samoan_text: A o lo'u alofa e le mavae atu lea ia te ia, ou te le pepelo foi i lo'u faamaoni.

samoan_text: A o lo'u alofa e le mavae atu lea ia te ia, ou te le pepelo foi i lo'u faamaoni.
